duas.title: Dua for Sehri
duas.arabic: وَبِصَوْمِ غَدٍ نَّوَيْتُ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
duas.transliteration: Wa bisawmi ghadinn nawaiytu min shahri ramadan
duas.translation_en: I intend to keep the fast for tomorrow in the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Dua for Iftar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اِنِّى لَكَ صُمْتُ وَبِكَ امنْتُ وَعَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ اَفْطَرْتُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni laka sumtu wa bika amantu...
duas.translation_en: O Allah! I fasted for You and I believe in You...
